input.command:
curl -s "https://public.zapper.xyz/graphql" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-zapper-api-key: 06112e77-d5df-4c51-8f86-707bc1a842c0" \
  -d '{"query":"query { tokenBalances($addresses: [Address!]!, $first: Int, $chainIds: [Int!]) { tokenBalances { totalBalanceUSD byToken(first: $first) { totalCount edges { node { name symbol price tokenAddress imgUrl1V2 balance balanceUSD onchainMarketData { priceChange24h marketCap } } } } } }", "variables": {"addresses": ["0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045"], "first": 10, "chainIds": [8453]}}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys, json; print(json.dumps(json.load(sys.stdin), indent=2))" | head -100
